entry.title: Re: Create or modify the background element for Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi14 

Can you please explain more about what you would like to achieve ?

I have never heard such a request, I'm curious to understand the business requirement to see if I can think of another way to build this (reserved fields cannot be changed nor can if-then rules be built into the custom basis formula).

Thanks

entry.title: Temporary Time Information for China new hires
entry.content:
Hi

Is anyone else using Temporary Time Information for China to deal with weekends becoming working days.

We use this feature but our HR team would like to know if there is a way of automating this for new hires as currently they create the temporary time information for each new hire in China.

Keen to know how others are handling this process.

Thanks!

Chris

entry.title: SAP IS-OIL and SD Invoice process
entry.content:
Hello all, 

Can somebody help me understand how does the volumetric data flow from SAP IS-OIL to the invoices in SD. Where is the connection established and if possible explain the whole hydrocarbon management to SD flow on how the invoices are generated once the production and valuation is done. 

Thank you.

entry.title: plm++.ecf originial - How to avoid this creation (SAP PLM ECTR-CREO)
entry.content: With the latest SAP PLM ECTR for CREO (SP09) there is an option to activate "Creo View" neutral format. It was activated within SAP PLM ECTR Creo Settings configuration and the dtype xml was also modified to include Creo View. A workstation application (PVZ) was created to support .pvz ie. Creo view files. The Creo view neutral format does get created. However like retail stores offering, "buy one get one free", in addition to Creo view file plm++.ecf also gets created. Is there a way to prevent the creation of plm++.ecf?

entry.title: Knowledge Exchange B1 Production Module
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we have been using SAP B1 for over a decade now but we only started using the Production module very recently and despite very valuable help by our SAP consultants, we are not super happy with the B1 production processes as they seem quite cumbersome.

Before investing time and money into possibly unnecessary add-ons, I thought it might be extremely valuable to see the Production module in action at another company which has gained more experience with it. Of course, this would not have to be a one-sided exchange as we are more than happy to share our knowledge regarding all other B1 modules.

Not 100% sure if this is the right place to ask this but: Is there anyone out there who is content with his/her B1 production processes and would be willing to share his/her practical experience with us?

Thanks for all responses!

entry.title: Re: Fields for People DPI missing
entry.content: If the source system is same, you can use the same DPI. Else try to calculate it as custom KPI under People KPI. However, from performance perspective it is always better to push down the calculations in back end.

entry.title: 🟢 It's Time for TypeScript (CAP edition)
entry.content:
TypeScript simply adds types to JavaScript. We can use it to reduce run-time errors in our CAP Node.js apps by catching bugs at design-time. After bringing you up to speed with the TypeScript basics we will look at the great new TypeScript features in CAP and show you how easy it is to make the switch.

Speaker: Mike Doyle

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden error in CAP app when accessing from BTP
entry.content:
Compare the URLs of the GET and POST requests by debugging in the browser during the call. The POST URL will be missing some parts that the GET URL contains. You can hardcode the missing part in your program for the POST call. This should resolve the issue.  

Debug and find the missing part of url:

ADD the missing part to your POST URL in code:

 

 

Calvin.

SAP Technical Lead.

entry.title: Re: Was SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL16 Build 7820 pulled for Windows X86/X64?
entry.content:
Does SAP have an estimate on when the new Windows EBF will be posted with a properly signed installer?

Separately - why doesn't the timestamp update at SAP SQL Anywhere - SAP Community when a comment or answer is posted, there's no way for that conversation to filter to the top, even with the multiple sorting options. Odd.

SAP SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: More on Activate / Deactivate BEx Conditions
entry.content:
Hello Tammy,

Is it possible to activate/deactivate the conditions using Excel VBA?

In any case let me know, please.

BR

Alejandro

entry.title: Re: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Publ...
entry.content:
Hi @Edna

Thanks for your response and the suggestion to use API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV.

I'm specifically looking for a solution that works directly within the on-stack ABAP environment in S/4HANA Cloud Public. My understanding is that cl_attachment_service_api is designed for this purpose, allowing me to avoid any HTTP communication overhead. 

I also believe that direct ABAP communication with cl_attachment_service_api could help reduce the risk of failures, which is important for ensuring attachments are saved reliably.

Please correct me if I'm wrong on any of these points.

Thanks again for your help!

entry.title: Re: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Sipra,

Thank you for reaching out to us. It seems that you may have consumed the limited quota. To check and resolve this, please follow these steps in your BTP tenant:

  1. Navigate to your subaccount.
  2. Go to Entitlements.
  3. Search for Build Process Automation.
  4. Check the Quota Assignment details for Automation - Attended.

If the quota has already been consumed, please assign an additional quota for Automation Attended. This should resolve your issue. If you continue to face challenges, please share a screenshot, and we will investigate further.

entry.title: Re: CX_PARAMETER_INVALID_RANGE for CL_ABAP_TSTMP for the ABAP program /GRCPI/SAPLGRIA_SPM
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: How to activate BEx-conditions per VBA script / macro
entry.content:
Hello Peter,

Have you found a way to do it?

Thank you,

Alejandro

entry.title: Re: CX_PARAMETER_INVALID_RANGE for CL_ABAP_TSTMP for the ABAP program /GRCPI/SAPLGRIA_SPM
entry.content: Even i am getting this dump in SRM production system. Can you please let me know the resolution for this?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order Approval
entry.content:
HI, you cannot copy from Dev to Production since some time the approver ID may differ from Testing and Production.  It has to create a manually in Production. 

Best Regards

Raj

entry.title: Combine FWSD from TM with a SD order in one invoice
entry.content:
My client, who is an LSP with operations from both TM (FWO) and SD, want to merge both services into a single invoice document.

When I create an FWO, the FWSD settlement document generates the invoice directly in SD, preventing the creation of a consolidated invoice with another document, as can be done in VF04 with multiple SD orders. 

Is there a standard mechanism that allows me to achieve this goal?

entry.title: Re: Tools for legal + management consolidation (including...
entry.content:
Hi

You might want to look at:

Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA - SAP Community

Insights into Value Chain - SAP Community

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: DMEE Configuration:Step By Step Part 1
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for detailed explanation with screen shots. I understand the concept and configuration very detailed how to create DME with attributes and source .........

 

Thanks again 🙏

entry.title: Editable column affects the values in other columns Var Pay
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on Var Pay template. We want to add an editable column in the worksheet, Column type: Money (New Column in the screenshot below), but when we insert an amount in this column, all the calculated columns change, even though New Column is not part of their formulas.

Before inserting a value in New Column

After inserting a value in New Column

We also noticed that a custom column in Business Goal changes, but none of these columns are connected with New Colunn

Before we insert value

After we insert value

Does anyone have any idea?

@xavierlegarrec , could you possibly have an understanding on why this occurs ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Cutover Management : Planning and Orchestration
entry.content:
what are the 

  • System Ramp-Down and Ramp Up activities for Finance and Commercial SAP Module?

entry.title: 🟢 Implement Observability in a Full-Stack CAP Application Following SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content:
Observability helps to take data-driven informed decisions based on runtime Observability telemetry data (logs, metrics, traces, events, ...), it provides insights into SAP & customer services and systems to understand and improve efficiency, scalability, resilience, and availability.
 
When you seek for fully detailed observability data of your application, you can use SAP Cloud Logging. SAP Cloud Logging allows you to slice and dice logs, metrics, and traces in order to analyse functional and performance behavior of your BTP workload on Cloud Foundry and Kyma.
 
Speaker: Gopal Anand

entry.title: Re: Introducing ABAP Open Source Namespaces
entry.content: @eloibermejo_spirit21 Thanks for your great feedback. Sounds like something we should check and follow-up. We'll have some discussions internally to see what we can do here.

entry.title: Re: Intrastat 201 - Scenario-Specific Roles and Responsibilities
entry.content: I have another scenario.  Company A in country A does a consignment fill-up at customer B in country B.  Customer B has distribution centers in country C, D, E.  Customer B transfers consigned goods from country B to countries C, D, E.  Goods are then sold to customers from all 4 of the customer countries thus triggering a consignment issue in company A.

entry.title: 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent | Brazil
entry.content:
No dia 17 de setembro, das 15h às 16:50h (BRT), convidamos você a participar da nossa 3ª Feira Laboral SAP Future Talent, um evento especialmente voltado para alunos universitários em busca de oportunidades de emprego e desenvolvimento profissional.

O SAP Future Talent é um programa de atração de talentos voltado para a carreira em consultoria SAP e tem como objetivo apoiar nossos parceiros e clientes na identificação de novos talentos e oferecer treinamentos desenhados para iniciantes na área.

A feira contará com palestras de colaboradores e parceiros SAP, com o objetivo de fornecer aos estudantes todas as informações de uma carreira em consultoria SAP e todo seu potencial em um mundo corporativo cada vez mais orientado por IA e outras tecnologias de ponta.

E o melhor: não há custos para participar deste programa!

Não perca a oportunidade única de conhecer o programa SAP Future Talent. Inscreva-se agora para participar e descubra como você pode impulsionar sua carreira profissional.

Agenda do evento:

  • Abertura SAP
  • IA SAP
  • Melhores Práticas para Processo Seletivo
  • BREAK
  • Mentorias SAP Future Talent
  • Its Group
  • Numen
  • Claro
  • Fusion
  • Essence it
  • PWC
  • Landing Page SAP Future Talent + QR Code para JoinSAPEcosystem
  • Q&A
  • Encerramento da feira

entry.title: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm curious to know if there is a way to manage the size of a signature file created with the InlineSignatureCapture control in the SAP MDK. I'm currently working on an app but the output of the signature is very large and does not fit into the pdf outputs in my client's workflow.

Is there something like "bitmapMode" available in the MDK like in Fiori mobile? See: https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/fiori-ui/android/compose/signaturecapture-inline.html

It doesn't appear that there is any option in the MDK documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/3642933ef2e1478fb1578ef2acba4ae9/Latest/en-US/reference/schemadoc/Page/FormCell/InlineSignatureCapture.schema.html

Any assistance you can provide would be great.

entry.title: 🟢 The superpower of CAP CDS: Calculated elements and annotation expressions
entry.content:
This session is a tour through CAP CDS modelling techniques, with focus on more advanced features. Some of the topics we will touch are managed associations and extensibility. The most time we will spend with two very powerful features: Calculated Elements, which help you to write clean and concise models, and Annotation Expressions, which ensure consistency of annotations across the model and simplify writing dynamic Fiori annotations.

Speaker: Steffen Weinstock

entry.title: Re: Was SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL16 Build 7820 pulled for...
entry.content: [deleted]

entry.title: 🔵 Improve RAG performance with Knowledge Graph and GraphRAG
entry.content:
In this session you will learn how to implement a GraphRAG use case to improve RAG performance by leveraging knowledge graph.

Speaker: Tahir Oegel

entry.title: Inconsistent Replication Flow Behavior in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Good day,

I am currently working on implementing business content within SAP Datasphere and have encountered issues with the replication flows. The flows are inconsistent—sometimes they run and complete successfully in a short time, while other times, the same flow hangs and takes hours to finish, despite processing a similar number of records.

I've also observed that manually restarting a specific object within the replication flow often resolves the issue, and it completes successfully. However, when the system automatically retries the process, it tends to hang. Additionally, I have scheduled the loads, but they frequently end up locking because the previous replication flow is still running.

Has anyone experienced similar issues, or does anyone have suggestions for ensuring the replication flows run more reliably? Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: 🟢 CAP Tools - What's new
entry.content:
We will showcase the latest features and updates in CAP Tools. See the new shell completion, test data and HTTP file generation, and how CDS models look like in mermaid diagrams. Additionally, you will learn about plugin capabilities, the new IntelliJ plugin for CDS, new project faCESTs, and more.

Speaker: Christian Georgi

entry.title: 🟢 The Art & Science of CAP
entry.content:
CAP's creator, Daniel Hutzel, gives us a deep dive, with special background insights, into key design aspects and enduring influential software patterns & philosophies that have shaped CAP, plus highlights on the nuclear power of some of the framework's building blocks.

Speakers: Daniel Hutzel and DJ Adams

entry.title: ABAP Cloud at Devtoberfest by SAP TechEd 2024
entry.content:
Hey everyone!

Devtoberfest is almost here - and it's Devtoberfest by SAP TechEd in 2024! 🍻

This year, Devtoberfest, the celebration of SAP technologies, is getting closer to SAP's premiere tech conference, SAP TechEd. The free, virtual event will run from September 23 to October 25, 2024, with a break during the week of SAP TechEd Virtual 2024. All sessions will be livestreamed/premiered on the SAP Developers' channel on YouTube.  

This already seems to be a tradition: Monday is 💚 ABAP & CAP Day again. 

You can find a list of all the session content in the SAP Community events area: Devtoberfest Events.

  • Monday: 🟢 ABAP & CAP
  • Tuesday: 🟣 Tooling (for SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Code)
  • Wednesday: 🔴 Integration
  • Thursday: 🔵 Machine Learning, AI, and Data
  • Friday: 🟠 Frontend

ABAP Cloud is the comprehensive development model for building clean core compliant, cloud-ready business applications, services, and extensions on both SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP S/4HANA, in the cloud and on-premise. The various ABAP sessions will cover different aspects of clean core extensibility with ABAP Cloud and GenAI - including key user, developer, and side-by-side extensibility - and more.  

Take advantage of this opportunity to interact with your peers and SAP experts - and get first-hand insights into the latest and greatest ABAP features!

Here is a compact overview of the various ABAP sessions at this year's event.

◆ 📅 [CW39] WEEK 1 

  • Clean core extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 
  • Understand the clean core extensibility options for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 
  • Building partner products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment 
  • Major updates for embedded analytics in ABAP Cloud 
  • Data integration in ABAP Cloud with SQL services and CDS external entities

◆ 📅 [CW40] WEEK 2 

  • Data modeling with the latest features of ABAP Core Data Services 
  • Tools for Clean ABAP 
  • SAP Forms by Adobe 
  • Test double mechanisms with ABAP Unit - Your friend in achieving effective test automation 

◆ 📅 [CW41] ABAP Cloud sessions at SAP TechEd Virtual 2024

◆ 📅 [CW42] WEEK 3 

  • What software developers should know about key user extensibility 
  • Gain Development Experience and Efficiency with Joule's ABAP Developer Capabilities
  • Developing and transforming your ABAP custom code for clean core in SAP S/4HANA 
  • How to extend the different SAP S/4HANA editions effectively and clean core compliant
  • Source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in Advanced Event Mesh via dynamic topics
  • Discover SAP Event Sources for Advanced Event Mesh

◆ 📅 [CW43] WEEK 4 

  • Overview of reuse services in ABAP Cloud 
  • ABAP Development Tools - News and Roadmap 
  • DevOps with SAP BTP ABAP Environment 
  • SAP Business Client & SAP GUI - The Journey Continues

Find below a detailed overview - including abstracts, schedules, speakers, and links - of the ABAP sessions. 
Click on the session titles to navigate to the respective event pages in the dedicated SAP Community Group, where you can already start communicating with the speakers, your peers, and the event organizers. Indicate your interest in the session in the "Will you be attending?" and use the "Add to Calendar" option to save the date and time to your individual calendar.
🔔 You can also use the "Notify me" feature on YouTube to be notified when livestreams and premieres start!

Enjoy the event! 🍻

WEEK 1

🟢 Clean core extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 
In this session, we will demonstrate how the 3-tier extensibility model helps you to consume Business APIs (BAPIs) with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA.
Speakers: Manikandan Rajasekaran (SAP), Vignesh Subramanian (SAP) 
Livestream:  📅 Sept 23, 2024 | ⏰ 9:00 - 10:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon) 
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Understand the clean core extensibility options for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 
Understand the difference between the different extensibility options - i.e. key user, developer, and side-by-side extensibility - available with ABAP Cloud for Cloud ERP and see how to use them. The focus of this session is on developer extensibility. 
Speakers: Carine Tchoutouo Djomo (SAP), André Fischer (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Sept 23, 2024 | ⏰ 11:00 - 12:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Building partner products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment  
In this session, you will learn how partners can develop, build, run, and operate ABAP Cloud products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment. Get an overview of the latest features and an outlook on the roadmap. 
Speakers: Burcu Karlidag (SAP), Ronny Pahlke (SAP), Frank Jentsch (SAP) 
Livestream:  📅 Sept 23, 2024 | ⏰ 13:00 - 14:00 CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

 

🟢 Major updates for embedded analytics in ABAP Cloud 
ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) based embedded analytics provides easy-to-use analytical tooling and allows you to drill down, aggregate, and display data from your core solution modelled with ABAP CDS. In this session, we present analytical data modeling basics in CDS as well as the new multi-dimensional analysis generator for building native, multi-dimensional SAP Fiori apps on top of the ABAP CDS-based analytical data model. 
Speakers: Andreas Riehl (SAP), Olivia Baumann (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Sept 23, 2024 | ⏰ 15:00 - 16:00 CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Data integration in ABAP Cloud with SQL services and CDS external entities
Data access patterns for ABAP-managed data can be categorized into data federation and data replication, as well as privileged access and business user access. Data federation allows for live access to the source system without replicating the data, while data replication involves replicating the data to a second system for local execution. In this session, we present steps for external data access from an ABAP System via SQL services and ABAP CDS based external entities. Data replication support with ABAP SQL service is also presented. 
Speakers: Arne Harren (SAP), Dr. Harish Bokkasam (SAP) 
Livestream:  📅 Sept 23, 2024 | ⏰ 17:00 - 18:00 CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

 

WEEK 2

🟢 Data modeling with the latest features of ABAP Core Data Services  
The ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) framework combines semantic data model definition with the computational power of the SAP HANA DB. In this session, we present best practices for data modeling based on the latest CDS features such as scalar functions, CDS aspects, external entities, and brand-new tool integrations such as the CDS graphical modeler for SAP Business Application Studio.  
Speakers: Matthias Herchenroether (SAP), Katharina Altrichter (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Sept 30, 2024 | ⏰ 9:00 - 10:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Tools for Clean ABAP 
Clean ABAP helps to write readable, testable and maintainable code. While much of this requires human expertise and team discipline, some aspects can be automated. In this presentation we will show you how ABAP cleaner and the Code Pal checks for the ABAP Test Cockpit can help you to easily integrate the Clean ABAP rules into your development process and give you an update on how ABAP cleaner has evolved since its initial release last year. 
Speakers: Björn Jüliger (SAP), Jörg-Michael Grassau (SAP) 
Livestream:  📅 Sept 30, 2024 | ⏰ 11:00 - 12:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 SAP Forms by Adobe 
Find out how to make the most of print forms and interactive forms using SAP Forms service by Adobe in the cloud and SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe on-premise. We explain the overall strategy, key functions and benefits, continuous improvements and options for the cloud. We will also give an update about the local deployment option based on XSA,  the SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Version. 
Speakers: Peter Barker (SAP), Sandra Thimme (SAP)
Livestream:  📅  Sept 30, 2024 | ⏰ 13:00 - 14:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Test double mechanisms with ABAP Unit - Your friend in achieving effective test automation 
Do you face any of the following challenges while writing automated tests in ABAP?
How to have stable automated tests? How to deal with the different types of dependencies while testing your ABAP code - ABAP classes, database dependencies via CDS, ABAP SQL, RAP BOs, function modules, role authorizations, etc? When to use which test double mechanism while writing ABAP unit tests? 
If yes, then this session can help you a bit!
Speakers: Sunil Bandameedapalli (SAP)
Livestream:  📅  Sept 30, 2024 | ⏰ 15:00 - 16:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

 

WEEK 3

🟢 What software developers should know about key user extensibility 
Key User Extensibility is a major pillar of the SAP S/4HANA Extensibility concept. It enables business experts to do last mile extensions by their own. But it also provides a lot of value for developers.
In this session, we provide an overview on the key user tools and will answer the question why developers should care for it. We provide examples for extensions that are realized as combination of key user and developer extensibility. An outlook on how generative AI support will change the creation of extensions will round off the session.  
Speakers: Thomas Schneider (SAP) 
Livestream:  📅 Oct 14, 2024 |  ⏰ 8:00 - 9:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Gain Development Experience and Efficiency with Joule's ABAP Developer Capabilities
Learn about Joule's ABAP developer capabilities. Dive through specific use cases, delve into the generative AI product roadmap for ABAP, and gain valuable insights on leveraging these advancements to enhance your productivity and experience in everyday development tasks.
Speakers: Dr. Jasmin Gruschke (SAP), Sebastian Baskovich (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 14, 2024 | ⏰ 9:00 - 10:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 Developing and transforming your ABAP custom code for clean core in SAP S/4HANA  
In this session we introduce the new guidelines for clean core ABAP development in the well-known 3-tier extensibility model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and on-premise and handle transformation options for existing custom code to ABAP Cloud including outlook of future generative AI support. You will also learn how ABAP Test Cockpit will support governance of your clean core developments.
Speakers: Olga Dolinskaja (SAP), Thomas Fiedler (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 14, 2024 | ⏰ 11:00 - 12:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 How to extend the different SAP S/4HANA editions effectively and clean core compliant
This session will explain how to extend the SAP S/4HANA editions effectively following the clean core guidance. This includes the 3-tier extensibility model, ABAP Cloud, CAP, LC/NC tools and how GenAI will support the developer. And we will explain how all this can work for customers who have a lot of legacy custom code in their system.
Speakers: Boris Gebhardt (SAP), Tim Back (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 14, 2024 | ⏰ 14:00 - 15:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🔴 Source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in Advanced Event Mesh via dynamic topics
Facilitate source-side filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment using custom context attributes comply with Data Privacy and Protection (DPP) and for more sophisticated event dispatching. Use dynamic topics for routing and filtering of RAP business events in SAP Advanced Event Mesh.
Speakers: Tatjana Pfeifer (SAP), Jonas Braun (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 16, 2024 | ⏰ 9:00 - 10:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

 🔴 Discover SAP Event Sources for Advanced Event Mesh
SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh is SAP’s market leading event mesh and distributes events in real time in your SAP technical ecosystem and way beyond. Now, what is an event mesh, as sophisticated as it may be, without events? Not much, right? Therefore, we will look into how to expose events from SAP business applications like SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC and SAP SuccessFactors solutions via Advanced Event Mesh. The session will both provide the theoretical and commercial background as well as provide detailed demos of event-enabling the different backends using different approaches.
Speakers: Karsten Strothmann (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 16, 2024 | ⏰15:00 - 16:00 CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

 

WEEK 4

🟢 Overview of reuse services in ABAP Cloud  
Reuse services offered by the ABAP platform provide general capabilities that are required by multiple services and apps. In this session, we will show how the most prominent reuse services that can be used in ABAP development with ABAP Cloud and which applications are delivered by SAP for monitoring and management of these services.The presentation will cover the use of application jobs, application logs, change documents, number ranges and the email API. 
Speakers: André Fischer (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 21, 2024 | ⏰ 9:00 - 10:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 ABAP Development Tools - News and Roadmap
In this session, learn the latest developments regarding ABAP Development Tools ranging from the ADT actions framework that let’s you extend your development environment with custom actions over new design options and an outlook on our future IDE strategy.
Speakers: Alexander Ritter (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 21, 2024 | ⏰ 11:00 - 12:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 DevOps with SAP BTP ABAP Environment
Learn about git-based customer lifecycle management (LM) on SAP BTP ABAP Environment which aims to combine proven and reliable ABAP LM benefits with the git-based CI/CD approach familiar to many. Watch live demos of our latest features and get an outlook on future developments. 
Speakers: Julie Plummer (SAP),  Dr. Christoph Pohl (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 21, 2024 | ⏰ 13:00 - 14:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

🟢 SAP Business Client & SAP GUI - The Journey Continues 
Transitioning users from SAP GUI to SAP Fiori via integrating the SAP Fiori Launchpad into SAP Business Client to launch native SAP GUI for Windows transactions and Fiori Apps in one-single-entry point from local and remote systems. 
Speakers: Sandra Thimme (SAP), Ralph Resech (SAP)
Livestream:  📅 Oct 21, 2024 | ⏰ 15:00 - 16:00 AM CEST
📄Access the presentation (🚧link coming soon)
💬Leave a comment. Give feedback. Ask questions. 

Have I aroused your curiosity? Then attend the various sessions to learn more about the latest and greatest ABAP innovations and best practices.

In the meantime, you can watch the replays of last year's events, SAP TechEd Virtual in 2023 and SAP's Devtoberfest in 2023. You can also check out the ABAP Cloud sessions at the upcoming SAP TechEd Virtual 2024 on October 8-9, 2024. 

We look forward to interacting with you!

entry.title: 🔵 Build an Orchestration workflow with Generative AI Hub
entry.content:
Orchestration combines content generation with a set of functions that are often required in business AI scenarios.

Functions include:

  • Templating, which lets you compose a prompt with placeholders that are filled during inference

  • Content filtering, which lets you restrict the type of content that is passed to and received from a generative AI model

Speaker: Thomas Schneider

entry.title: 🟢 How to build a CAP plugin with Node.js
entry.content:
Learn how to develop your first plugin in CAP Node.js and connect it with a CAP application. Enrich the plugin with functionality, learning the different techniques on how a plugin can interact with the base app.

Speakers: Daniel Schlachter, Ram Prasad and Robin De Silva

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA on Premise – Adding custom new Pre-Conditions with F4 Value help in Flexible Workflo
entry.content:
Excellent blog, did max of my developments using this blog

But I am stuck on Invoice workflow 

I would be thankful if u can guide me

My requirement is to trigger Invoice workflow park on cost center field

But I couldn't find a Std CDS view which I can use 

So as per the blog we can create a CDS view but would it work for invoice workflow?

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSP...
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,
Yes, i have tried with WAIT = abap_true and  WAIT = abap_false and it didn't work 
Regards

entry.title: 🟢 Transforming legacy code to CAP with the help of GenAI
entry.content:
GenAI can help you with your cloud transformation by accelerating the migration of legacy code. We will demonstrate how new tools and even your own prompts can speed up migrations to CAP by factors using an example from the XS Classic world comprising xsodata and xsjs.

Speakers: Mamatha K H and Ajaysimha Durbhakula

entry.title: 🟢 Streamlining GenAI Development: A Developer's Guide to CAP LLM Plugin Mastery
entry.content:
A practical guide to using the new CAP LLM Plugin that make it a breeze to develop any GenAI CAP application with features like anonymization, access to LLM capabilities with chat completion, embedding generation etc and tight integration with SAP HANA Vector Engine capabilities with embedding storage and retrieval.

Speakers: Akash Amarendra and Madankumar Pichamuthu

entry.title: Re: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content: MDk does have any default options for the size of the signature.  I would suggest taking at look at the Image Handling Showcase app and consider resizing the image after capture if it is too large.  The SHowcase app has an example of resizing an image that might be helpful here.

entry.title: Re: Tolerance group has no user assignment for company code
entry.content:
You have defined Tolerances for PI Differences tables keys of activity Assign the user to the Tolerance group in the transport 

Please check KBA - 3466881 to see if this helps in your case. Check what entries you see in table V_043_B.

entry.title: 🟢 How to build a CAP plugin with Java
entry.content:
Learn how to develop your first plugin in CAP Java and connect it with a CAP application. Enrich the plugin with functionality, learning the different techniques on how a plugin can interact with the base app.

Speakers: Daniel Schlachter, Ram Prasad and Robin De Silva

entry.title: Re: Automation Launcher in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Please see the screenshot of Entitlements in my Subaccount. Please guide me if I'm missing anything.

entry.title: 🟢 Extending your On-Premise OData Entities in CAP
entry.content:
In this session, "Extending your On-Premise OData Entities in CAP," we will explore a strategic approach to enhancing your existing OData services without altering the underlying backend systems. The focus will be on adding custom fields to your existing OData entities using SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model while ensuring that these fields are persisted in a separate, dedicated storage layer. This approach allows for seamless integration of new data attributes, enabling you to extend functionality without impacting the core backend, thus maintaining system stability and compliance with existing processes.

Speakers: Jorg Thuijls and Katan Patel

entry.title: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Hello - can you please help to fix the below code ? Req is to copy the complete xml but replace just one field by incrementing its value by 1.

Input:
<item>
<Field>10</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>20</Field1>
</item>

Output:
<item>
<Field>11</Field1>
</item>
<item>
<Field>21</Field1>
</item>

I am pasting xsl I wrote with input and output values.

XSL:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:apply-templates select="*"/>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
<xsl:variable name="i" select="//RETAILNUMBER"/>
<RETAILNUMBER>
<xsl:value-of select="$i+1"/>
</RETAILNUMBER>
</xsl:template>

<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Input xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>0</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER>
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root

Output (Note the to be values in the output for retailnumber

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns1:root xmlns:ns1="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
<IT_TRANSACTION>
<item>
<RETAILLINEITEM>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 2
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
<item>
<RETAILNUMBER>1</RETAILNUMBER> //should bd 3
<RETAILTYPECODE>2001</RETAILTYPECODE>
</item>
</RETAILLINEITEM>
</item>
</IT_TRANSACTION>
</ns1:root>

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order Approval
entry.content:
We can transport the workflows for Purchase requisitions and Purchase order from  Dev to QA to Prod.
User id can be different in different systems but we can have the same employee id can be same across systems .

the below OSS note gives detailed information.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2813272

Hi Experts,

Where can I find the Business function that are required to be activated for PS in S4HANA 2023 system .

 

Thanks,

Kehkashan A J

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi Thore,

at least for a HANA backend you can also try to achieve this by changing the connection in DSP from DPA to Cloud Connector.

Br.,

Dirk

entry.title: Re: Calculated Inspection Characteristics using BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS
entry.content: Make sure there's no OSS notes you need to apply by searching in support.sap.com. Try to debug line by line within the BAPI. Somewhere it could be clearing due to no reason whatsoever. I've noticed this while working with a lot of BAPIs.  Also check the BAdIs, sometimes there's logic which clears the depending on some predefined condition in the BAdI.

entry.title: Re: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content: Ok thanks Bill. I'll look into that.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects Private Cloud Edition (PCE) Webcast Overview
entry.content: Hi @rpuranik thank you for reading.  I do not have any updates.

entry.title: iOS Usage Strings not updating in build
entry.content:
I've tried updating multiple iOS Usage Strings in the Build Service Asset section, but most of the fields are not properly updated in the actual iOS build's Info.plist. I'm using Build Apps Community Edition.

To be sure this wasn't an isolated issue, I created a new app and changed all of the Usage Strings to "TEST UPDATE" in the Assets tab, and only 3 of the strings keys actually updated in the build (screenshots below).

I've figured out how to manually update this with help from this previous post, but is no one else having this issue? Apple required that I updated these strings for camera/image library usage before they'd approve the app.

entry.title: Re: CAP application gives 401 unauthorized error after de...
entry.content: Do you see any errors in the approuter log?

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
This XSLT would do it - 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>
<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/>

<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
  <xsl:copy>
    <xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
  </xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: how to manage sap landscapes by two solution manager system
entry.content:
Hi experts

I have the next scenario with a customer:

There’s a productive Solution Manager (SMP) where ChaRM manages the transports of a classical 3-systems landscape (ABD100 , ABQ300, ABP300).

____ChaRM in SMP___
ABD100 -> ABQ300 -> ABP300

A new Solution Manager (SMQ) with the role of DEV/QAS is going to be implemented for training and testing  purposes of new solman functionalities.


We want to configure ChaRM in this new Solman SMQ to train new staff in the use of the functionality and obviously we need a managed landscape to move transport requests. According to the note 2915372, only one ChaRM can manage the whole landscape, so, it is not possible to use the landscape of ABD100, ABQ300 and ABP300. But I want to know if it is possible to create 2 new clients in the system ABD (ABD200 and ABD250) to simulate a 2-systems test landscape managed by solman SMQ and handle transport requests between these new clients using ChaRM.
__ChaRM in SMQ__
ABD200 -> ABD250
Please also let me know if there are special considerations, for example it comes to my mind that all transport requests will be created in system ABD but in different clients and managed by different ChaRMs. Can this lead to a problem in the way that ChaRM operates?

Another option is that this new 2-systems test landscape can be created with two clients in the system SMQ (SMQ200 and SMQ250)

__ChaRM in SMQ__
SMQ200 -> SMQ250
Is this possible? Can a Solution Manager be managed by itself?

Kind Regards.

Arturo

entry.title: Re: PS Easy Cost Planning Integration with S/4HANA Financial Planning
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

This article is very helpful. However, we have activated UPA in our system.

As per this blogpost - https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/financial-planning-with-universal-parallel-accounting-in-sap-s-4hana-2022/ba-p/13581094 it's mentioned that costing model (CKCM) does not work with UPA. 

Can you please also confirm if this functionality will also work with UPA and can we still use ECP without the costing model (CKCM)

entry.title: How to add missing fields to app
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

There are some fields missing on the app 'Manage Customer Returns - version 2' (ID: F4832), like "Sales office" and "Sales Group". We can see those fields are present on app 'Manage Sales Orders - version 2' (ID: F3893).

Is there a way to add those fields on the app screen?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add missing fields to app
entry.content:
You can add those fields through Adapt Ui.

  1. Open app 'Manage Customer Returns - version 2' (or other desired app);
  2. Click on your profile icon, on the right-upper corner, and then on 'Adapt Ui';
  3. Add new fields;
  4. The fields available to addition will be presented on a list, you can select the desired ones. For the app Manage Customer Returns - version 2, the fields 'Sales Group' and 'Sales Office' can be added.
  5. Finally, save the new screen version and activate it.

entry.title: SAP->CPI Integration - WSDL Creation
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are trying to integrate ECC with an ecommerce platform via CPI.

SAP ECC would send data to CPI. 

Question is - what are best practices for the wsdl creation if there are any. 

I would really appreciate the information.

entry.title: Re: Can you trust Pam?
entry.content: Mohamed225 - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam. I'll update the blog to include this link. If you can't access this link you probably need the SAP super user in your organisation to create an s-user for you.https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/users.html

entry.title: SAP Developer News, September 5th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/09/05/sap-developer-news-september-5th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

Devtoberfest

  • Devtoberfest Community Page to Join/Register: https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/gh-p/Devtoberfest

Five years of CPILint:

  • Five years of CPILint:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/five-years-of-cpilint/ba-p/13812638
  • Release of version 1.0.5:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/cpilint-version-1-0-5-is-here/ba-p/13810431
  • Devtoberfest session - 🔴 Automate your SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPILint:
     https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/automate-your-sap-cloud-integration-governance-with-cpilint/ev-p/13802890

ML and AI learning content

  • Leveraging Image Embedding and HANA Vector Engine for Reverse Product Search: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/leveraging-image-embedding-and-hana-vector-engine-for-reverse-product/ba-p/13798320
  • How Metadata Enrichment can enhance SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine on GenAI scenarios: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-metadata-enrichment-can-enhance-sap-hana-cloud-vector-engine-on-genai/ba-p/13662543
  • “Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core” CodeJam in Munich: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-generative-ai-hub-on-sap-ai-core/ev-p/13854907
  • "Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA" as an SAP CodeJam topic: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-quot-as-a-new-sap/ba-p/13574098
  • Machine Learning with SAP HANA Cloud: a time-series forecasting example: https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning-blogs/hands-on-tutorial-machine-learning-with-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13683430

SAP BTP Solution Diagrams shape library in draw.io

  • New built-in SAP shape library for BTP solution diagrams in draw.io: https://www.drawio.com/blog/sap-diagrams

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 Devtoberfest Promo
2:23 Five years of CPILint
3:17 ML and AI learning content
5:35 SAP BTP Solution Diagrams shape library in draw.io

TRANSCRIPT

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for September 5th, 2024.

[Josh] Hey everybody, it is September-October and that time period reminds me of a certain festival. That's right, Devtoberfest. Devtoberfest, an SAP TechEd event is here. We're putting it on and it starts in two weeks. So the first event is going to happen September 23rd, so please register. It's easy to register, you just join the SAP group. I'll put a link to that community page. And if you're already a member of that community page group, you're already enrolled to participate in Devtoberfest this year. And you can earn points.

And speaking of points, we have that four level game board, you can reach Nerdvana, and you qualify to be in our grand prize drawing. Like years past, people have gone on trips to major theme parks around the world as part of Devtoberfest. So by earning points and learning, you actually get a prize, possibly. So go to that community page and click join.

The other thing I wanted to point out is the number five. It's the fifth year I've had a blue beard, that I've been your blue bearded idiot. But hey, it's also the fifth Devtoberfest. Can you believe it? We've been doing this for developers, by developers for five years, but it's not just for developers, right? Anybody who wants to learn as part of the SAP community can pick a topic they're interested in and they can just complete tutorials or attend events and watch an SAP expert present to them. So five days of the week, five different topics.

Speaking of that, if you look at the calendar in our SAP community page, You'll see Monday has green circles for ABAP and CAP. Tuesday is tooling Tuesdays with a purple circle. That's fun to say. Wednesday we have red circles for integration. Thursday, don't be mad, machine learning AI and data with a blue circle. And then we have front end Fridays with an orange circle. So really, two weeks away, four great weeks of content, but Devtoberfest is five weeks long this year because we are going to stop and do SAP TechEd October 8th and 9th live from Germany. So the developer advocates, a lot of SAP experts will be doing virtual tech ed live during that week of October 8th and 9th. And then we come right back for week three of SAP Devtoberfest on October 14th. So please register. Let's pump up those numbers. Let's do as many tutorials as possible and see how many people can qualify for Nerdvana. Can't wait to see you online. Bye.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP developers. Look what I got over the mail. Yep, a sticker of CPILint CPILint, which is an open-source tool that can help you with your Cloud Integration governance, just turned five years old. Thanks, Morten, for all the great work. And well, to celebrate it, Morten just released a new version of the tool, version 1.0.5, which now supports OAuth 2.0 to communicate with your cloud integration tenant, a mechanism to import a rules file, in a new rule to check user roles. If you want to learn more about CPI-Lint, make sure to check out the tutorial session that we have scheduled for the 25th of September, where Morten will be sharing with us how to automate our SAP Cloud Integration governance with CPI-Lint. Hasta la vista, SAP developers.

[Witalij] You might have heard about SAP HANA Cloud's new capability called the vector engine a lot this year. You might have even participated in the developer challenge, which I organized earlier this year and where we used it as well. Now at the SAP community, you will find two new blog posts describing interesting cases. So one is how metadata enrichment can enhance SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine. And the other one is how leveraging image embeddings and SAP HANA vector engine for reverse product search can be implemented.

If you are joining the new SAP CodeJam topic that my teammate Nora announced last week on getting started with the Generative AI Hub in SAP AI Core, then you would use this capability as well. We have two of these CodeJams already announced, and they are available for you to sign up if you are in Warsaw or in Munich.

Getting started with machine learning using SAP HANA was quite a popular topic for code trends during the first half of this year. But even now we have already four more events scheduled for you. So if you are in Isernhagen or in Stuttgart in Germany, or if you are in Porto or Lisbon in Portugal, then please join me this month if you're interested in some hands-on exercises where you will be using SAP Business Application Studio, Python, and Predictive Analytics Library from SAP HANA Cloud to train some classification models. The other kind of model that are extremely popular among SAP customers are time series forecasting.

And my colleagues, Andreas Foster and Yannick Schaper, published recently a blog post describing how to do that, where they're focusing on one of the most powerful time series forecasting algorithms. And they're showing how to build both single and multiple time series.

[Antonio] Hola, SAP developers. It is easier than ever to get started with SAP BTP solution diagrams. Why is that, you might ask? Well, the icons are now available out of the box in draw.io. All you have to do is click on More Shapes at the bottom of the Shapes panel in draw.io, enable the checkbox next to the SAP Shape library in the Networking section, and click Apply. Voila. All the icons are now available there for you to start your diagrams. I'm looking forward to seeing your architecture diagrams in SAP Community. Happy diagramming.

entry.title: Re: minSdkVersion 26 cannot be smaller than version 30 de...
entry.content:
Check your .mdkproject/App_Resources_Merge/app.gradle and make sure it contains the following and then try running create-client again.

android {
    defaultConfig { 
        minSdkVersion 30
        targetSdkVersion 34
    }
}

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Great workaround. thanks.

I tried to check if it worked for me but it did not. I try to push down to a S4HANA CDS. Unfortunately push downs are mostly needed for transactional data.


However this option is very good for master data tables.

entry.title: Re: MDG BP search result list enhancement
entry.content:
Result list is dependent on attribute list of BP_ROOT only at the moment. One option would be to add the BP_ROLE as additional entity under the feeder class attributes but not sure if that will suit the purpose.

It would also tricky as we are looking at 1:N relation which could cause issue if more than 1 role is assigned to the Business Partner(Usually 2 roles are the norm)

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Thanks for the prompt reply - I had to add below lines to make it work.  Also, 'shallow' line does not work with  xsl 1.0/2.0 but worked with 3.0

               <xsl:template match="@* | node()">
                              <xsl:copy>
                                             <xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
                              </xsl:copy>
               </xsl:template>

My complete xsl - does it need any change ?

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
               <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>
               <!--<xsl:mode on-no-match="shallow-copy"/> -->
               <!--
              <xsl:template match="/">
                              <xsl:apply-templates select="*"/>
               </xsl:template>
       -->
 
               <xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
                        <xsl:copy>
                                <xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
                        </xsl:copy>
               </xsl:template>
                <xsl:template match="@* | node()">
                      <xsl:copy>
                            <xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
                       </xsl:copy>
                </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Migration to S/4 - extension of material number field MATNR
entry.content: Frederic, do you know if is mandatory in S4HANA?? I prefer maintain 18char. of course we dont need 40 , thanks!

entry.title: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content:
Hello, 

we have many batch jobs that are schedule by account where the user as left the organization.

we want to change to the owner of the job to be a generic batch job user.

example: we have this user who as left the company and he had a lot of batch job scheduled. we want to keep these job but we also want to delete that user.

here the created by user is AlexR, we want to change the created by user to user batches.

entry.title: How to rename document's name sent to the printer?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is It possible to rename the document name sent to a printer? I have a report that prints an Adobe Form, when I check the printer queue on Windows, I noticed that a pattern: user+system+sap spool. I would like to change this name for MyDocument for exemple.

entry.title: Re: S4 1610 Extend material lengh to 40 characters
entry.content: Team, do you know if is mandatory in S4HANA to change to 40?? I prefer maintain 18char. of course we dont need 40

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: i forgot to mention we are using ERP ECC 6. SAP BASIS 731, SP13

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: SM37-- Check the job that is scheduled status --All way left corner --Click Job-->Change -->Then Steps -- Click on the Row which contains program name --user parameter etc -->then Click on Pencil Icon -- Change -->-- Job will open up and replace user ID with user id you want to

entry.title: Ensure Deployment Readiness with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement: Discover the New CQC Service
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community, 

 

A stable technical platform is essential for any company's smooth operation. Whether you’re just starting with SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement, adding new functionalities, or performing a routine 'health check,' SAP ensures a seamless process.

For the above reason, we're excited to announce that SAP Enterprise Support now offers a new Continuous Quality Check for Deployment Readiness for SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement.


This service will help you to review your key cloud solution settings to identify potential risks. You'll receive recommendations based on SAP best practices. This service is especially helpful before going live but can also be used as a system health check. Some additional benefits are listed next: 

  • Analyze system configuration.
  • Verify SAP interfaces to ensure stability, performance, and throughput.
  • Review security configuration.
  • Minimize potential risks.
  • Provide recommendations in alignment with SAP best practices.
  • Solution capabilities usage and configuration validation.


How to request this CQC service?

Remote Services can be requested via the new Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  1. Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  2. Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

SAP recommends service booking six (6) weeks before the go-live date, to allow for the delivery four (4) weeks before your go-live date and provide adequate time to review and implement any SAP recommendations.

Any Questions?

Please, contact the SAP Value Map team! 

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

entry.title: Re: How Automated Processing Rules for Bank Statement works?
entry.content: Exceptional blog and with a lot of important content. Great job!

entry.title: Re: S4 1610 Extend material lengh to 40 characters
entry.content: No

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: Hello, that part is fine. what we want to change is the created by users

entry.title: ABAP BW RSA1 program name of routine
entry.content:
Hello ,

Where can I find the generated program name of created routine from RSA1 tcode?

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: You can not change who created the job -- i do not think there should be any relevance who created the job if you job is still relevant -- other option -- cancel the job and create a new job with ID you want it should be created by--still not understanding why it is relevant who created the job?

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: As long as you switch the user to batch user -- jobs will be keep on running even the user ID does not exists in the system.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: @Bhaven oops, apologies... I didn't notice that your version was 1.0 and I had copied it and adjusted the logic. It's much simpler to use the shallow-copy with 3.0 than add the extra template IMO.  I updated the answer for accuracy.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: That is exactly what i want to avoid. i have over 600 jobs.

entry.title: Customer fields involved in pricing determination
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For our customer, we’re implementing Subscription billing with S4hana public cloud (scope item 57Z).
Customers are replicated from S4 to Subscription billing.

In S4, the access sequence for pricing is based on tables containing the following fields: material ID, customer ID, customer group 2, customer group 3, where customer group 2 & 3 are the standard fields stored on customer master data -> Sales area level.

The customer requirement: the same tables and access sequence should be used for pricing in subscription billing, this means that fields customer group 2 & 3 should exist in subscription billing -> customer level and and be relevant for pricing.

My initial idea was to create custom references on customer level in subscription billing, to map customer group 2 & 3 in the integration flow to populate the custom references, then to map the custom references in pricing.

Unfortunately it seems that custom references on customer level are not inherited in the subscription, which means that the corresponding values wouldn’t be taken into consideration for pricing determination.

Do you have any suggestion on the best/closest to standard solution to achieve such scenario and avoid a costly development?

Our main doubt is how we could get fields customer group 2 & 3 and their respecting values in subscription billing in a way that they are then relevant for pricing determination. Once this is solved, I think we could reproduce the S4 access sequence via lookup tables and through the fallback strategy in the price element specifications.

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content: I found a demo program on how to parse XML, DEMO_SXML_TOKEN_READER. I believe I can use this as an example to get what I need.

entry.title: Re: India Localization Compliance Reports in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @Sahil_Grover 

Can you please tell me how we can correct the place of supply error and error related to date format in GSTR1 report as our GSTR1 report is also getting generated with errors and I am not sure how we can fix this. 

Please highlight the steps

Thank you

entry.title: Re: how to change batch job owner user
entry.content: just follow the steps and change the user as mentioned -- you will be fine. Don't worry about created by.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: I don't see the new code - did you paste it ?

entry.title: Re: How to create custom fields in the Business Process with "Custom Field Fiori App ( ID F148
entry.content:
Hi Arasb, thank you for your question!

As for SAP S/4Hana 2023, Custom field app. store the field automatically in custom Fields tab. For transactions VA01/2/3. But you can add the custom field in the SAP Fiori apps. in other sections. For example in Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 ( F3893 ) in the  “New: Sales Order” as a column field.

 

Regards,

Marcela.

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content: @Bhaven I fixed it once, but it's annoying when the alignment gets fouled up so when I "fixed" it again I inadvertently copied the wrong 1.0 version. It's now fixed a second time for accuracy.

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content: Hi SAP community, What is the way to add leading zeroes in S4 HANA, call function 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' isn't working, its throwing error - Not allowed

entry.title: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA, Call function 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' is throwing error - Not permitted in restricted scope, what is the other way to remove zeroes and then add zeroes as per the data type?

entry.title: Re: XSL to replace one field in the xml
entry.content:
Thanks but wandering if I need to add the shallow-copy line. Below code works - it has 3.0 but even 1.0 would suffice.

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8"/>

<xsl:template match="RETAILNUMBER">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:value-of select=". + 1"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Transitioning Custom Catalogs and Groups from Standalone Fiori to Embedded Fiori Deployment
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently operating with a central hub deployment and plan to transition to an embedded deployment model. Could you please provide guidance on how to migrate custom catalogs and groups from our standalone Fiori system to the embedded environment(S4HANA1909)?

Thanks

Nikhil

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori front-end server SAP S/4HANA 

@Jorge_Baltazar @Jocelyn_Dart

entry.title: sales solution configurator
entry.content:
Hi,

I Had multiple questions on SAP SSC if anyone has the answer for the same.

1. if i want to run the same with ECC what is required to integrate the same.

2. there is a string mention of "Bottom up" configuration but how does that work with without a BOM especially when i am pushing the created model to a sales order.

3. and what is the role of solution modeling environment, does it come with SAP SSC or a separate purchase

entry.title: Re: Meas doc creation allows points for items not related to Notif Tech OBj
entry.content:
Hello Scott,
The behavior of your SAP system is totally fine.
This is how the standard works.

From functional understanding its like:
People creating a notification (example - maintenance request) for specific asset, can take the readings of this particular equipment, 
and of the others, which are for example in the proximity. 

From pure SAP perspective:
In the screen, which you describe, there is also a button 'All measuring points on Object'. 
Once clicked, only the MPs assigned to this equipment will be visible. 
sapdude SAP PM EAM measuring points course S4HANA
Cheers,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Remove and add zeroes in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Arushi,

you can try the ALPHA format option of the string templates. Maybe this works for you.
